content: React Email 6.0.0 (released April 2026) unified all components into the single react-email package. @react-email/components and individual component packages are deprecated and no longer needed. Main import is from react-email. Components render to table-based HTML safe for all email clients. Includes a preview dev server (npx react-email dev). New async render() function. React 19 compatible. Install: npm install react-email
